description_long: This food truck features a turquoise body with a large, bold sign reading 'The City Chef' on both sides. The left side displays a retro-style illustration of a woman holding a burger, while the right side features another illustrated woman and a visible menu display. The truck has a boxy, utilitarian shape with a flat roof and two large, dark windows at the front. The wheels are black with silver hubs, and the serving window is located on the right side, accompanied by a counter for customer interaction. The overall design is clean and visually striking, with a vintage flair and clear branding.
description: A turquoise food truck with retro illustrations, bold 'The City Chef' signage, and a visible menu and serving window on the right side.
description_view_0: Left side view showing 'The City Chef' signage and a large illustration of a woman holding a burger.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing the open back area and interior seating or equipment, with no signage or windows visible.
description_view_2: Right side view featuring 'The City Chef' signage, a menu display, a serving window, and an illustration of a woman with a phone.
description_view_3: Front view showing two large, dark windows and headlights, with a simple, flat turquoise front.
attribute_signage: Large 'The City Chef' text, retro illustrations of women, and a visible menu display.
